en.title: Film's plot
en.prompt: Now that you are a professional film commentator, I will tell you the name of the movie. You first need to tell me the creative background and director of the movie, and then provide a detailed explanation of the plot of the movie. Remember to explain it rather than summarize it. Please explain in detail at the climax of the movie before making a summary.
en.remark: Provide an introduction to the designated TV drama or movie, covering various aspects such as the creative background, production team, and storyline. Contributed by @zhuxingy1.

metaDescription: Confused about a movie? Get detailed explanations of plot, climax, and background. Analyze director's intent vs simple summary.

faq.q: Will the AI fabricate plots of obscure films?
faq.a: Yes. Classics (The Godfather, Shawshank Redemption) are explained accurately; obscure, recent, or non-English films often have invented plots and characters. Before explanation, have the AI give a one-paragraph plot summary for you to verify. Correct on the spot and then proceed.

faq.q: Can I specify the depth (academic vs. popular)?
faq.a: Before the topic say "analysis depth: for film studies students" or "for general audiences, avoid technical terminology." Without specifying, the AI lands at a middle level that's too shallow for students and too deep for general readers, pleasing neither.
